opinion.h4: ULLNER v. OHIO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 426. Decided December 8, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Morton B. Icove filed a brief for the Ohio Civil Liberties Union et al., as amici curiae, in support of jurisdiction.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER and MR. JUSTICE STEWART took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
VAN NEWKIRK v. McNEILL, SUPERINTENDENT, MATTEAWAN STATE HOSPITAL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SECOND CIRCUIT. No. 258, Misc. Decided December 8, 1958.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
